data.subject: Q3 Workspace Strategy Alignment Deck
data.body: Hi team, we need to finalize the Q3 alignment deck by Friday. David, can you pull the user growth metrics? Chris, please update the engineering milestone roadmap. Let's sync on Wednesday.

data.subject: Design Review: Polaris Spacing Integrity
data.body: I reviewed the new dashboard layout. The spacing variables are correct, but let's make sure the header is extremely prominent (make it bigger!). Jannica, please double-check the typography size tokens to fit this style.

actions.text: Verify typography size tokens on dashboard

data.subject: Customer Feedback Report & Actions
data.body: The feedback from our key enterprise partners looks solid. However, they reported slow load times on heavy data tables. Ryan, let's run performance profiling on the data loader. Emily, we should update the partner status report.

actions.text: Profile performance on heavy data tables
